calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Mar-13-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:39am and concluding at 9:59am.

Plaintiff Enterprise Rent-A-Car Company of San Francisco, LLC appearing represented by Douglas Mahaffey, Esq. via zoom.
Defendant Buffalo Market, Inc. not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines witness for Plaintiff DANNY LEAHY Group Truck manager and Custodian of Records and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Enterprise Rent-A-Car Company of San Francisco, LLC, and against Defendant Buffalo Market, Inc., as follows:

Damages: $116,473.76
Prejudgment Interest: $42,706.84
Attorney Fees: $3,500.00
Costs: $1,479.80

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $164,160.40

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
